title: Digging Machine / Automatic Mining Machine
description: This block will mine blocks in front of the machine and add them to the inventory of the block. Fuel is required, and this mod also supports a dedicated cargo cart with a drop system when the cart gets full.
body:
This block will mine blocks in front of the machine and add them to the inventory of the block. Fuel is required, and this mod also supports a dedicated cargo cart with a drop system when the cart gets full.

## Usage
You must have 3 blocks, the Drill Cart, the Cargo Cart, and the Fuel Cart. Place the drill cart in the direction you would like to mine. Then, place the fuel cart behind the drill cart, and the cargo cart behind the fuel cart. Fill the fuel cart with fuel (coal, charcoal) and then right-click, while holding shift, on the drill cart.
